description: baseline agent_improved
increased agent_improved weights to activity=0.50 toxicity=0.50 stability=0.30 while keeping dev_penalty=0.15
increased agent_improved stability weight from 0.30 to 0.35 while keeping activity=0.50 toxicity=0.50 and dev_penalty=0.15
added toxicity<=0.7 and dev_penalty<=3 feasibility-first partition ahead of the current weighted agent_improved score
added soft squared penalties above toxicity>0.7 and dev_penalty>3.0 on top of the current agent_improved weighted score
added a 0.15 min(activity_norm, 1-toxicity_norm) activity-safety balance bonus on top of the current agent_improved weighted score
ranked agent_improved by Pareto fronts across activity/toxicity/stability/dev_penalty with the current weighted score as the within-front tie-break
added a 0.10 sqrt(activity_norm*stability_norm) activity-stability synergy bonus on top of the current agent_improved weighted score
blended the current weighted agent_improved score with a 0.20 normalized threshold-gated activity-stability bonus using sigmoid toxicity and dev_penalty gates
increased agent_improved dev_penalty weight from 0.15 to 0.20 while keeping activity=0.50 toxicity=0.50 and stability=0.30
changed agent_improved to keep the current weighted-sum top-20 shortlist and rerank that shortlist by a threshold-gated activity-stability score
replaced agent_improved's weighted-shortlist rerank with a LambdaMART model trained on nonlinear rank-aware and oracle-proxy endpoint features
replaced agent_improved with an MLP trained on oracle top-k agreement and nonlinear normalized endpoint interaction features

changed agent_improved to rerank the weighted-sum top-30 shortlist by an equal-weight ensemble of the threshold-gated score and a LambdaMART model trained on oracle-aligned nonlinear endpoint features
changed agent_improved to form a hard-constraint-aware weighted top-20 shortlist and rerank that shortlist with a top-heavy MLP trained on nonlinear endpoint interaction features
changed agent_improved to rerank the current weighted-sum top-40 shortlist with a multi-oracle LambdaMART ensemble trained on nonlinear endpoint features and per-oracle top-20/top-40 relevance labels

changed agent_improved to rank normalized toxicity/dev_penalty feasibility buckets by an equal-weight full-pool ensemble of threshold-gated, MLP, and LambdaMART scores trained on top-k-aware nonlinear endpoint features
changed agent_improved to use a full-pool LambdaMART ranker trained on multi-oracle top-k relevance labels and nonlinear endpoint interaction features
changed agent_improved to rank hard toxicity<0.5/dev_penalty<=3 feasibility buckets first and sort each bucket by rank-product score with threshold-gated activity-stability tie-breaks

changed agent_improved to expand the current weighted top-20 shortlist with LambdaMART top candidates on nonlinear endpoint features before reranking the union by the threshold-gated activity-stability score
changed agent_improved to use a full-pool LambdaMART ranker trained on nonlinear endpoint features and multi-oracle top-20/top-40 relevance labels
changed agent_improved to rerank the current weighted-sum top-20 shortlist by an equal-weight ensemble of the threshold-gated score and full-pool rank-product score
changed agent_improved to use a full-pool MLP ranker trained with top-heavy weighted Huber loss on oracle-aligned nonlinear interaction features

changed agent_improved to rerank the current weighted-sum top-20 shortlist by a harmonic-agreement ensemble of the threshold-gated/rank-product heuristic and an MLP trained on oracle-consensus top-20/top-40 targets from nonlinear endpoint features
changed agent_improved to rerank a weighted-sum/LambdaMART top-30 consensus-union shortlist by the threshold-gated and rank-product heuristic ensemble using nonlinear LambdaMART endpoint features
changed agent_improved to rank the union of the threshold-gated, rank-product, and Pareto top-20 shortlists by reciprocal-rank fusion

changed agent_improved to rerank the threshold-gated/rank-product/Pareto top-20 union shortlist by reciprocal-rank fusion of the current heuristic consensus and a consensus-target LambdaMART trained on nonlinear endpoint features
changed agent_improved to rank Pareto front layers first and rerank each front by reciprocal-rank fusion of the threshold-gated and rank-product scores
changed agent_improved to use a full-pool multitask MLP trained to predict pareto-rank/rank-product/threshold-gate oracle scores from nonlinear endpoint features and rank by their harmonic mean
changed agent_improved to rank normalized toxicity/dev-penalty feasibility buckets by an oracle-agreement LambdaMART trained on nonlinear endpoint features
changed agent_improved to use a full-pool LambdaMART ranker trained on top-heavy composite oracle targets from nonlinear rank-based endpoint features
changed agent_improved to prioritize candidates appearing in at least two of the threshold-gated, rank-product, and Pareto top-20 shortlists before ranking by reciprocal-rank fusion
changed agent_improved to add top-20 candidates from a nonlinear-feature MLP to the 2-of-3 consensus shortlist and rerank that pool by combined votes plus heuristic/MLP reciprocal-rank fusion
changed agent_improved to rank 3-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates ahead of 2-of-3 survivors and rerank each tier with a nonlinear-feature LambdaMART oracle model

changed agent_improved to rerank the current 2-of-3 heuristic consensus shortlist with a true LambdaMART trained on oracle-style nonlinear endpoint features while keeping reciprocal-rank fusion fallback unchanged
changed agent_improved to use a full-pool true LambdaMART ranker trained on top-heavy oracle-agreement relevance labels from nonlinear endpoint features
changed agent_improved to rerank the union of the hard-feasible fusion top-40 and the threshold-gated/rank-product/Pareto top-20 heuristic elites with a nonlinear-feature LambdaMART
changed agent_improved to rank candidates by the current 2-of-3 heuristic consensus flag, then LambdaMART oracle score, with reciprocal-rank fusion as tie-break

changed agent_improved to rank candidates by the current 2-of-3 heuristic consensus flag, then a top-heavy oracle-trained MLP on nonlinear endpoint/feasibility features, with reciprocal-rank fusion as tie-break

changed agent_improved to rank 2-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates first, then hard-feasible candidates, then an oracle-trained MLP+LambdaMART ensemble on nonlinear endpoint features, with heuristic reciprocal-rank fusion as tie-break
changed agent_improved to rerank 2-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates by reciprocal-rank fusion of LambdaMART, threshold-gated, rank-product, and Pareto scores, with LambdaMART as tie-break
changed agent_improved to rank by geometric agreement of an engineered-feature LambdaMART and the threshold-gated/rank-product/Pareto scores
changed agent_improved to rank normalized-feasible candidates first, then an engineered-feature oracle-trained MLP+LambdaMART ensemble, with bottleneck and threshold-gate tie-breaks

changed agent_improved to rerank 2-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates with a pairwise MLP trained on oracle top-20 consensus targets from engineered endpoint features, with heuristic reciprocal-rank fusion fallback unchanged

changed agent_improved to rank 2-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates by multiscale top-20/top-40 agreement across threshold-gated, rank-product, Pareto, and a tuned LambdaMART score, with reciprocal-rank fusion as tie-break
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool with a tuned oracle-trained MLP on engineered nonlinear endpoint features and a top-heavy weighted loss

changed agent_improved to rank the 2-of-3 heuristic consensus shortlist by a LambdaMART trained on engineered feasibility/bottleneck features and a geometric-mean-plus-min oracle consensus target, with heuristic fusion as tie-break
changed agent_improved to rank normalized toxicity/developability-feasible candidates first with an engineered-feature top-heavy LambdaMART, then order the remainder by threshold-gated score

changed agent_improved to prioritize candidates jointly supported by engineered-feature oracle-trained MLP and LambdaMART top-40 ranks under toxicity/dev_penalty quantile filters, then rank that shortlist by a harmonic bottleneck score with learned/heuristic fusion fallback
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool by a bottleneck-aware MLP+LambdaMART ensemble on engineered nonlinear endpoint features, with heuristic reciprocal-rank fusion as tie-break

changed agent_improved to rerank the union of threshold-gate-pass and 2-of-3 heuristic-consensus candidates with a true LambdaMART ranker on oracle-inspired nonlinear features, then fall back to heuristic fusion

changed agent_improved to rerank 2-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates by reciprocal-rank fusion of threshold-gated, rank-product, Pareto, and an engineered-feature top-heavy LambdaMART order, with the LambdaMART order as tie-break

changed agent_improved to keep the 2-of-3 heuristic consensus filter, but rerank candidates by a relevance-binned LambdaMART trained on engineered bottleneck and feasibility features with oracle percentile targets
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool directly with the oracle-trained LambdaMART model instead of consensus-shortlist heuristic fusion

changed agent_improved to rank the full pool with a true LambdaMART ranker trained on duplicated per-oracle relevance labels from engineered nonlinear endpoint features, with heuristic consensus fallback if unavailable
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool directly with a tail-focused oracle-trained MLP on heuristic meta-features and nonlinear endpoint interactions
changed agent_improved to rank lexicographically by exact 3-oracle top-20 vote count, then threshold feasibility, top-40 vote count, and worst-oracle percentile support

changed agent_improved to rerank 2-of-3 heuristic consensus candidates by reciprocal-rank fusion of threshold-gated, rank-product, Pareto, and a per-oracle LambdaMART ensemble scored by 0.6*min+0.4*mean predicted oracle support, with the learned score as tie-break

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 heuristic consensus plus reciprocal-rank fusion, but replace the raw-endpoint LambdaMART score with an engineered-feature LambdaMART trained on a geometric-mean oracle-agreement target
changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 heuristic consensus fusion, but train the LambdaMART tie-break on oracle top-20 agreement count plus top-40 support instead of mean oracle score

changed agent_improved to rerank the 2-of-3 heuristic consensus shortlist by threshold-gated score and fill the remaining positions by reciprocal-rank fusion of the engineered-feature MLP+LambdaMART ensemble with the Pareto score

changed agent_improved to rerank the 2-of-3 heuristic consensus shortlist by vote tier and a geometric-mean consensus of threshold-gated, rank-product, Pareto, and learned-ensemble scores, with the remaining pool still filled by learned-ensemble+Pareto fusion
changed agent_improved to rank directly with a tuned engineered-feature LambdaMART model instead of the heuristic consensus shortlist, keeping the old consensus fusion only as fallback
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool by a feasibility-gated LambdaMART score trained on a bottleneck-heavy oracle target with added percentile and constraint-shortfall features

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist plus learned+Pareto filler selection, but rerank the final selected top-20 by threshold-gated score with learned-ensemble and activity tie-breaks

changed agent_improved to choose the top-20 from the union of the 2-of-3 heuristic consensus shortlist and hard-feasible candidates ranked by a per-oracle MLP+LambdaMART soft-min ensemble, with the union reranked by threshold-gated score and the tail by learned+Pareto+rank-product fusion

changed agent_improved to filter to the top 3k threshold-gated candidates, then rank that block with a per-oracle MLP+LambdaMART soft-min ensemble trained on normalized oracle scores with added gate and shortfall features, leaving the tail in threshold-gate order
changed agent_improved to rank by exact oracle top-20 vote count and use a multitask oracle-trained MLP as the tie-break within vote tiers

changed agent_improved to build the final top-20 from the union of the top-40 threshold-gated, rank-product, Pareto, and learned-ensemble shortlists, reranking that union by maximin consensus with vote and fusion tie-breaks

changed agent_improved to rerank the existing 2-of-3 heuristic consensus shortlist with an MLP trained on oracle top-20 consensus labels plus shortfall features, replacing the previous learned ensemble and keeping Pareto-based filler selection

changed agent_improved to rank hard-feasible candidates ahead of the rest with a direct conservative MLP trained on composite oracle scores and pairwise ranking loss, replacing the heuristic consensus shortlist

changed agent_improved to expand the 2-of-3 consensus shortlist into a top-60 oracle-fusion pool, rank that pool with a top-heavy conservative LambdaMART reranker, and rerank the selected top-20 by threshold-gated score
changed agent_improved to rank hard-feasible candidates ahead of the rest and sort each tier by the oracle-trained MLP+LambdaMART ensemble, with learned+gate+Pareto tie-breaks
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool with a LambdaMART model trained on graded oracle top-k consensus labels, replacing the heuristic consensus shortlist

changed agent_improved to add the oracle-trained learned ensemble as a fourth top-20 voter when building the consensus shortlist, while keeping the current threshold-gated rerank and learned+Pareto filler structure

changed agent_improved to rerank the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist by exact vote tier and a conservative score-space MLP+LambdaMART ensemble trained on added shortfall/log features, with the tail still filled by learned+Pareto fusion

changed agent_improved to keep the 2-of-3 consensus shortlist, but fill the remaining slots from a mild-feasibility tier ranked by a top-k-aware LambdaMART trained on added feasibility-margin and bottleneck features, then rerank the final top-20 by threshold-gated score

changed agent_improved to replace the heuristic consensus shortlist with a true LambdaMART ranker trained on top-heavy oracle-vote relevance labels and added shortfall features, keeping the current consensus policy only as a failure fallback
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool directly with a LambdaMART model trained on added heuristic vote/meta-features and a top-k-aware composite oracle target

changed agent_improved to rank hard-feasible candidates ahead of the rest and sort the full pool by a per-oracle MLP+LambdaMART harmonic ensemble trained on oracle scores, with gate/rank-product/Pareto tie-breaks
changed agent_improved to build the top-20 from an 80/20 mix of hard-feasible and global balanced rankings, ordered by bottleneck, harmonic, rank-product, Pareto, and gate scores

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist, rerank it with a per-oracle LambdaMART trained on oracle-aligned meta-features, and fill remaining slots from hard-feasible candidates before a learned+fusion reserve

changed agent_improved to replace the heuristic consensus shortlist with a threshold-gated feasible-first full-pool ranking fused from per-oracle LambdaMART models trained on the three evaluation oracle scores and added threshold-margin features

changed agent_improved to replace the consensus-shortlist rerank with a full-pool lexicographic ensemble ranked by exact oracle vote count, worst oracle rank, and mean oracle rank, with the learned ensemble only as a late tie-break

changed agent_improved to rank the full pool by exact heuristic-oracle top-20 vote tier with a per-oracle LambdaMART soft-min frontier score as the primary within-tier order, using the exact oracle frontier and threshold-gated scores as tie-breaks

changed agent_improved to rank the full pool by 3-oracle top-20 vote tier and a nonlinear product of threshold-gate, rank-product, Pareto, and a conservative top-k-aware MLP+LambdaMART percentile score

changed agent_improved to rank the full pool by a Copeland-style majority vote across threshold-gate, rank-product, Pareto, MLP, and LambdaMART signals, while retraining the learned models on a conservative min/geom/mean oracle target with tuned defaults

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist plus learned+Pareto filler selection, but rerank the final selected top-20 by direct LambdaMART score with threshold-gated and activity tie-breaks

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist and threshold-gated final rerank, but replace the learned+Pareto filler selection with a top-heavy conservative MLP trained on oracle scores

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist plus learned+Pareto filler selection, but prioritize exact heuristic top-20 vote count ahead of threshold-gated and learned scores when ordering the shortlist and final top-20

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist plus learned+Pareto filler selection, but rerank the final selected top-20 by threshold-gated score with a learned+rank-product+Pareto reciprocal-rank-fusion tie-break instead of learned score alone
changed agent_improved to hard-filter toxicity<=0.7 and dev_penalty<=3.0 before directly ranking survivors with a top-heavy LambdaMART model trained with lambdarank relevance labels

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist plus threshold-gated rerank, but augment the learned ensemble with a conservative per-oracle MLP trained to predict Pareto, rank-product, and threshold-gate scores separately

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist, but rerank the shortlist and final top-20 primarily by a conservative per-oracle MLP bottleneck score using min+harmonic aggregation of predicted Pareto/rank-product/threshold-gate scores instead of threshold-gated score alone

changed agent_improved to rank the full pool by a conservative learned ensemble trained on top-heavy shared-oracle top-k targets, fused with nonlinear threshold-gate, Pareto, and rank-product scores instead of the 2-of-3 consensus shortlist

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist, but rerank the shortlist and final top-20 with a top-heavy conservative LambdaMART trained on multi-oracle scores instead of the per-oracle MLP bottleneck reranker

changed agent_improved to keep the top-14 heuristic consensus core, but fill the rest of the top-20 by interleaving a direct MLP full-pool ranking trained on a top-k agreement plus composite oracle target

changed agent_improved to rerank the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist and final top-20 by a conservative ensemble of per-oracle MLP and per-oracle LambdaMART scores instead of the per-oracle MLP alone
changed agent_improved to rank the full pool directly with a top-heavy conservative MLP trained on oracle scores with weighted Huber loss instead of the heuristic 2-of-3 consensus shortlist reranker

changed agent_improved to keep the current 2-of-3 consensus shortlist, but retrain the per-oracle MLP reranker with a top-heavy multitask weighted Huber loss that emphasizes candidates strong across all oracle heads instead of uniform regression
